title: [trustless://eil] Ivo Georgiev - Integrating EIL into Ambire
description:
Ivo Georgiev, Ambire CEO, dives into how they made a significant step towards a seamlessly cross-chain and unified wallet experience, thanks to EIL. He demonstrates single-signature crosschain transactions and explores the working principles behind Ethereum Interoperability Layer.

Talk given during day 1 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
